newsitems.title: Planet Zoo 2 - Announce Trailer
newsitems.author: pcrowther
newsitems.contents: Calling all Zookeepers!Grab your Keeper outfit, brush off your wellies and get ready for the sequel you’ve been waiting for - Planet Zoo 2 is coming!Soar to great heights with flying birds, prepare your diving suits as aquatic species make a splash, and take your conservation efforts beyond your zoo in brand-new Wildlife Reserves! Fully aquatic species make a splash in their stunning debut!Build custom aquariums to home an exciting line-up of aquatic species including Blacktip Reef Sharks, Hawksbill Turtles, and more!  By popular request, introduce a diverse mix of brilliant flying birds including the vibrant Toco Toucan. House your birds in fully customisable aviaries built from barriers, support poles and dynamic mesh covers. Construct beautiful habitats for your animals to thrive in as they interact with the world around them with new, realistic behaviours. From herding to grazing on the vegetation you provide for them. Experience a generational leap of animal detail and immersion with incredible natural movements and expressive emotions that bring each animal to life like never before. Conservation goes beyond your zoo! Take on global conservation projects and meet specific requirements to release your animals into fully customisable, expansive Wildlife Reserves made up of living ecosystems created by you. Design, rewild and observe a network of entirely natural homes that allow your animals to thrive. You can even improve your reserves with expansive research, all whilst maintaining a minimal staff presence! Discover a world of community content in the Frontier Workshop. Freely explore and download player-created blueprints and creations from across platforms and subscribe to your favourites to place them in your zoos. For those looking for even more choice, dedicated Zookeepers can expand their animal conservation efforts further with the Planet Zoo 2: Deluxe Edition, which bundles the Planet Zoo 2 base game alongside the Planet Zoo 2: Deluxe Upgrade Pack. This pack introduces six additional animal species from around the world, as well as a selection of exclusive animal signs to decorate your zoos even further. Coming to Steam on October 13th 2026. Pre-Order now! Are you ready to let your creativity soar? Pre-purchase Planet Zoo 2 on Steam

newsitems.title: Planet Zoo 2 Announced With New Aquatic Life And Aviaries
newsitems.author: Tait Graham
newsitems.contents: Frontier Developments, the creators behind Planet Coaster and Elite: Dangerous, have officially announced that Planet Zoo 2 is coming soon. As an expansion and upgrade to the original Planet Zoo, the team has added numerous improvements to both gameplay and graphics. This starts with an almost complete overhaul of the native lighting system, thanks to the Cobra engine. Player zoos will now react to the sun and moon moving across the world, with shadows and lighting matching that motion. Even the trees and bushes react proportionally to the lighting. Although the real focus of Planet Zoo 2 is, of course, the animals. Frontier has delivered on this front by creating entirely new animations, behaviours, and emotions, so much so that the animals can show you when they are thirsty, for example, just by watching their behaviour. All of this is complemented by much more fluid and detailed animations for animals like chimpanzees, who now climb and have fun on climbing frames... Read more
